generated_oml:
import DTDFVocab from "https://example.com/DTDFVocab"
instance FrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction identification insights used to adjust robot control parameters for improved motion accuracy"
]

instance ParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting robot control parameters based on friction model outputs",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization of robot motion data traces"
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models, and parameter updates for motion accuracy",
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionInsight, ParameterUpdateAction
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Unified dashboard visualization of robot motion data traces",
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance SysMLModelingTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling of robot components",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService,
    base:isContainedIn RobotFirstAxisEnvironment
]

instance SimulinkSimulationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for multi-physics simulation of friction models",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService,
    base:isContainedIn RobotFirstAxisEnvironment
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for data linking and interoperability",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService,
    base:isContainedIn RobotFirstAxisEnvironment
]

instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from physical sensors",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService,
    base:isContainedIn RobotFirstAxisEnvironment
]

instance SINUMERIKController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for robot motion control and sensor data processing",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService,
    base:isContainedIn RobotFirstAxisEnvironment
]

instance DashboardVisualizationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard tools for data trace visualization and monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService,
    base:isContainedIn RobotFirstAxisEnvironment
]

instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on the motor for position measurement",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorDataStream,
    base:isContainedIn RobotFirstAxisEnvironment
]

instance GearboxSecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder behind the gearbox for position measurement",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorDataStream,
    base:isContainedIn RobotFirstAxisEnvironment
]

instance MotorDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder, GearboxSecondaryEncoder
]

instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Input current data measured by SINUMERIK controller with metadata linking to physical sensors and processing components",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorDataStream,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance PositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position angle data from encoders with metadata linking to physical sensors and processing components",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorDataStream,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque data calculated from current and motor parameters with metadata linking to physical sensors and processing components",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorDataStream,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity data derived from position measurements with metadata linking to physical sensors and processing components",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorDataStream,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram and Internal Block Diagram for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingTool,
    base:isContainedIn RobotFirstAxisEnvironment
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Coulomb-Viscous friction model in Simulink",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool,
    base:isContainedIn RobotFirstAxisEnvironment
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Stribeck friction model in Simulink",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool,
    base:isContainedIn RobotFirstAxisEnvironment
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Dahl friction model in Simulink",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool,
    base:isContainedIn RobotFirstAxisEnvironment
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box LuGre friction model in Simulink",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool,
    base:isContainedIn RobotFirstAxisEnvironment
]

instance FrictionTwinningProcess : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Purpose-driven methodology including problem identification (friction understanding), asset and model analysis, creation of simulation models, data trace identification, and continuous evolution through live data integration for friction model refinement during operation",
    base:isContainedIn RobotFirstAxisEnvironment
]

instance RobotFirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MotorPositionEncoder, GearboxSecondaryEncoder, SysMLStructuralModel, CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, DahlFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel, SysMLModelingTool, SimulinkSimulationTool, AssetAdministrationShell, MQTTProtocol, SINUMERIKController, DashboardVisualizationTool, FrictionTwinningProcess
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming and processing for continuous friction model identification during robot operation, with no specific frequency specified in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestration of physical robot components (motor, gearboxes, encoders), MQTT-streamed sensor data, processing components executing Simulink models and SysML-based calculations, and dashboard visualization for integrated data representation."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated stage, covering continuous monitoring and model refinement during operational use of the robot to account for wear, tool changes, and application variations."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation via comparison of simulated data (from friction models) versus measured reference data to assess accuracy, with models refined based on deviations to improve motion control precision."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data transmission from physical sensors to the digital shadow system."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) and SysML standards for modeling and data structure integration."
]
